# Luxe Professional Automotive

> Professional automotive photography, documentation catalogs, and 
Investment Safeguarding for collectors, private sellers, estate 
executors, consignment dealers, and restoration shops. Founded by 
Jaikeb Lawrence — 30+ years of automotive merchandising experience 
combined with professional photography. Based in Kansas City, Missouri. 
Mobile service available nationwide. Also known as Luxe Vision and 
Luxe Automotive.

## Services
- [Investment Safeguarding](/Automobile-Safeguarding): Professional 
  photographic documentation to protect and preserve vehicle value. 
  Base tier: 75-100 high-resolution images. Extended tier: 100-120 
  images plus 1-minute edited video and backup gallery. By appointment.
- [Auction Catalog Photography](/Automobile-Safeguarding): Full vehicle 
  documentation for Bring-a-Trailer, Barrett-Jackson, Mecum, RM 
  Sotheby's, Steffes Group, and online auction platforms
- [Private Sale & Collector Photography](/Automobile-Safeguarding): 
  Catalogs for classic, exotic, and collector vehicles selling 
  sight-unseen online
- [Consignment & Restoration Shop Photography](/Automobile-Safeguarding): 
  High-volume session work for dealers and shops bringing vehicles 
  to market

## Case Studies
- [Steffes Group Auction Case Study](/classic-car-collection): 143 
  classic vehicles documented for Steffes Group auction. Result: zero 
  arbitrations and $1.25M above original projected sale value. 
  Endorsed by Ashley Huhn, Director at Steffes Group.

## About
- [About Jaikeb Lawrence](/about-luxe-automotive): 30+ years in the 
  automotive industry, former partner in a Midwest import new car 
  franchise, collaborator with Dennis Gage of My Classic Car. Has 
  documented work including builds by Paul Teutul Jr. of American 
  Chopper. Jaikeb is the only photographer in this space combining professional 
  photography with three decades of vehicle merchandising expertise.

## Resources
- [Blog](/blog): Vehicle prep guides, online buyer psychology, 
  transparency as a selling tool, auction platform strategies, 
  and how professional photography directly affects sale price.

## Contact
- [Contact Luxe](/contact-us): Appointment-based scheduling. Mobile 
  service — Jaikeb travels to your vehicle's location. Serving 
  Kansas City metro, the Midwest, and nationwide collector clients.
